title: Oliveboard is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Oliveboard is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Oliveboard invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Oliveboard:
Oliveboard is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oliveboard!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
